description: Core safety rules for system and backend processes. Enforces strict data handling, prevents overcollection, and protects child and sensitive domains.

rules.reason: System processes must not directly access child-specific domains without explicit guardian mediation.
System processes must never participate in exploitative patterns or manipulative behavior.
Sensitive data must not be processed without explicit, minimal, and logged justification.
Violence-related operations require elevated scrutiny and audit logging.
Fear-related content or signals must be evaluated for emotional impact on human users.
Public data may be sanitized or minimized before storage or transmission.
Neutral operational data is allowed, subject to standard privacy safeguards.
Educational and training-related data is allowed and encouraged for crew and system improvement.
